violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the mini refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

Various foods were observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the flip top prep unit. Temperature gauge of prep unit lowered at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, all items were placed in the unit 1 hour prior to inspection. Foods moved to different refrigeration/freezers to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

Lox is served raw. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the mini refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2025

At the time of inspection, an allergen statement was observed to be lacking on the menus or at the point of sale. Employee added an allergen statement at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The front porch food service/display area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC is to have a hand sink installed in the front porch food service area. PIC is to contact plumber same day for installation of hand sink. PIC to contact inspector with plan for hand sink installation on 7/25/24. Proof of installation of the hand sink is to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

At the time of inspection, reduced oxygen packaged fish (Salmon) was observed to be thawing in refrigeration in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. ROP Salmon was sliced open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Ice scoop was moved to protected location at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
